caseStudies.title: SaaS Platform Scale-Up Architecture
caseStudies.description: Helping a rapidly growing SaaS company redesign their architecture to handle 10x user growth without sacrificing performance or reliability.
caseStudies.challenge: A fast-growing B2B SaaS company with 50,000+ users was experiencing significant performance degradation and reliability issues as they scaled. Their monolithic architecture couldn't handle the increasing load, resulting in slow response times, frequent outages, and escalating cloud infrastructure costs. Customer complaints were rising, and the engineering team was spending more time firefighting than building new features.
caseStudies.solution:
We worked closely with the company's engineering team to develop and implement a comprehensive architectural transformation. Our approach included:

1. Conducting a thorough assessment of the current architecture, identifying bottlenecks and failure points.

2. Designing a new microservices-based architecture with clear domain boundaries and service interfaces.

3. Implementing a phased migration plan that minimized disruption to existing customers.

4. Redesigning the database layer with proper sharding and caching strategies to improve performance.

5. Setting up comprehensive monitoring and auto-scaling capabilities to anticipate and respond to demand fluctuations.

6. Implementing CI/CD pipelines to streamline deployment and reduce time-to-market.
results: Reduced infrastructure costs by 40% while handling 10x more traffic
Improved system uptime from 99.5% to 99.99%
Cut database response times by 65%
Implemented robust monitoring and auto-scaling solutions
Decreased deployment times from hours to minutes
Reduced time spent on maintenance by 70%
Enabled the business to scale to 500,000+ users without performance issues

testimonial.quote: The architectural transformation was game-changing for our business. We went from constant performance issues to a rock-solid platform that easily handles our growth, all while reducing our cloud costs significantly.
testimonial.author: CEO

caseStudies.title: FinTech Compliance & Security
caseStudies.description: Supporting a financial technology startup in building a secure, compliant payment processing system that met stringent regulatory requirements.
caseStudies.challenge: A fintech startup had developed an innovative payment processing solution but faced significant challenges meeting the stringent security and compliance requirements necessary to operate in the financial sector. They needed to achieve PCI DSS compliance, implement robust security measures, and establish the necessary controls for handling sensitive financial data.
caseStudies.solution:
We guided the company through the complex landscape of financial technology compliance and security. Our approach included:

1. Performing a comprehensive gap analysis against PCI DSS requirements and other relevant regulatory frameworks.

2. Designing a secure architecture for processing and storing sensitive payment information.

3. Implementing end-to-end encryption, secure authentication, and authorization controls.

4. Establishing secure development practices, including code reviews, static analysis, and penetration testing.

5. Creating a comprehensive security monitoring and incident response capability.
results: Achieved PCI DSS and SOC 2 compliance in record time
Implemented secure architecture processing $10M daily
Passed rigorous security audits with zero critical findings
Reduced development time for compliance features by 50%
Established automated security testing in the development pipeline
Secured partnerships with three major financial institutions
Successfully processed over $100M in transactions with zero security incidents

testimonial.quote: Cubeunity didn't just help us meet compliance requirements — they built security and compliance into our DNA. Their expertise was invaluable in navigating the complex regulatory landscape and gave our partners and customers confidence in our platform.
testimonial.author: Founder

caseStudies.title: Marketplace Platform Scaling
caseStudies.description: Transforming a struggling marketplace platform into a high-performance system capable of handling millions of transactions.
caseStudies.challenge: An online service marketplace was experiencing significant technical challenges as they attempted to scale their platform. Their matching algorithm was inefficient, leading to poor user connections and lost revenue. Payment processing was unreliable, causing trust issues with service providers. The platform suffered from frequent outages during peak usage times, and fraud was increasing as they grew.
caseStudies.solution:
We implemented a comprehensive technical transformation strategy:

1. Redesigned the matching algorithm to consider multiple factors including location, availability, ratings, and specific service attributes.

2. Built a robust payment and escrow system with proper reconciliation and error handling.

3. Implemented a sophisticated fraud detection system using behavioral analytics and machine learning.

4. Restructured the database and caching layers to improve performance and reduce load times.

5. Redesigned the architecture to be horizontally scalable, with proper load balancing and failover capabilities.
results: Redesigned matching algorithm improving conversion by 35%
Built scalable payment and escrow system handling 3M+ monthly transactions
Reduced fraud by 80% through advanced detection systems
Cut infrastructure costs by 45% while improving performance
Decreased page load times by 60%
Increased platform reliability to 99.95% uptime
Enabled the business to scale to over 1 million monthly active users

testimonial.quote: The technical transformation of our platform was remarkable. Cubeunity helped us overcome critical technical challenges that were holding back our growth. The improvements in matching, payments, and fraud prevention transformed the user experience and allowed us to scale confidently.
testimonial.author: Co-Founder

caseStudies.title: Health Tech HIPAA Compliance
caseStudies.description: Developing a HIPAA-compliant architecture for a telehealth platform ensuring patient data security while supporting rapid growth.
caseStudies.challenge: A telehealth startup had developed an innovative platform connecting patients with healthcare providers, but faced significant challenges implementing the rigorous security and compliance measures required in healthcare. They needed to achieve HIPAA compliance, implement secure video consultations, properly manage protected health information (PHI), and integrate with existing healthcare systems.
caseStudies.solution:
We led the development of a comprehensive HIPAA-compliant technical architecture and processes:

1. Conducted a thorough HIPAA gap analysis and created a detailed remediation plan.

2. Designed and implemented a secure architecture for handling protected health information (PHI).

3. Established end-to-end encryption for all patient data and communications, including video consultations.

4. Implemented proper authentication, authorization, and audit logging throughout the platform.

5. Developed secure APIs for integrating with electronic health record (EHR) systems.
results: Built fully HIPAA-compliant system passing all security audits
Designed secure video consultation platform supporting 50,000+ daily consultations
Implemented compliant EHR integration with major healthcare systems
Created secure data architecture with end-to-end encryption
Established comprehensive audit logging and monitoring
Secured partnerships with five major healthcare providers
Scaled to support over 1 million patient accounts while maintaining compliance

testimonial.quote: Cubeunity transformed our telehealth platform from a compliance liability into a secure, robust system that earned the trust of major healthcare providers. Their expertise in both healthcare regulations and scalable architecture was exactly what we needed to grow confidently.
testimonial.author: CEO

caseStudies.title: Technical Team Turnaround
caseStudies.description: Helping an e-commerce company restructure their engineering team, improve development processes, and deliver a critical platform upgrade on time.
caseStudies.challenge: A multi-channel e-commerce company was experiencing severe problems with their engineering organization. Team turnover was high, with key engineers leaving regularly. The development process was chaotic, with no consistent methodologies, resulting in missed deadlines and poor quality code. A critical platform upgrade had been delayed multiple times, putting the business at risk.
caseStudies.solution:
We implemented a comprehensive transformation of the engineering organization:

1. Conducted in-depth interviews with team members to understand root issues and gather improvement suggestions.

2. Restructured the engineering team with clear roles, responsibilities, and career paths.

3. Implemented Agile development methodologies with proper planning, prioritization, and delivery processes.

4. Established quality assurance practices including automated testing, code reviews, and deployment verification.

5. Created a technical debt reduction plan that balanced new feature development with system improvements.
results: Restructured engineering team reducing turnover from 40% to 5%
Implemented agile processes that increased delivery velocity by 60%
Successfully delivered major platform upgrade that had been delayed for months
Reduced critical bugs by 75% through improved QA processes
Decreased production incidents by 80%
Improved team morale and collaboration across departments
Established sustainable development practices that continued after our engagement

testimonial.quote: The transformation of our engineering team exceeded all expectations. Cubeunity not only helped us deliver the platform upgrade we desperately needed but rebuilt our entire technical organization into a high-performing unit that now drives our business forward.
testimonial.author: COO

caseStudies.title: AI/ML Infrastructure Optimization
caseStudies.description: Building efficient data pipelines and deployment architecture for an AI startup, significantly reducing costs while improving model performance.
caseStudies.challenge: An artificial intelligence startup specializing in computer vision was struggling with their ML infrastructure as they scaled. Their data pipeline was inefficient, creating bottlenecks in model training. Infrastructure costs were skyrocketing, consuming a significant portion of their runway. Model deployment was a manual, error-prone process that took days to complete.
caseStudies.solution:
We redesigned their ML infrastructure and implemented modern MLOps practices:

1. Architected an efficient data pipeline with proper preprocessing, validation, and versioning capabilities.

2. Implemented infrastructure optimizations including spot instances, GPU utilization improvements, and efficient resource scheduling.

3. Designed a scalable inference architecture that dynamically allocated resources based on demand.

4. Built a comprehensive MLOps pipeline with automated testing, evaluation, and deployment capabilities.

5. Implemented a monitoring system that tracked model performance, drift, and system health.
results: Reduced model training costs by 70% through infrastructure optimization
Implemented MLOps pipeline reducing deployment time from days to minutes
Created efficient data pipeline processing 500M+ records daily
Designed scalable inference architecture handling 10,000 requests per second
Decreased model training time by 85%
Improved model accuracy by 15% through better data management
Reduced overall cloud infrastructure costs by 60%

testimonial.quote: Cubeunity's expertise in AI infrastructure was transformative for our business. They helped us build systems that not only scaled efficiently but did so at a fraction of our previous costs. The improvements in our data pipeline and inference architecture allowed us to deliver on customer commitments that previously seemed impossible.

companyValues.title: Plain Language First
companyValues.description: We explain technology in terms anyone can understand. No jargon, no assumptions — just clear communication.

companyValues.title: Business Before Technology
companyValues.description: Every technology decision we recommend is driven by your business goals, not the latest trend or our tool preferences.

companyValues.title: Practical Over Perfect
companyValues.description: We focus on solutions that work in the real world — on your budget, with your team, in your timeline.

companyValues.title: Build for Independence
companyValues.description: Our goal is to make you less dependent on us over time, not more. We document everything and transfer knowledge to your team.

companyStory.headline: Our Story
paragraphs: Cubeunity was founded by Ruben Khachatryan in 2024 with a simple belief: every business deserves access to senior technical expertise — not just the ones that can afford a full-time tech team.

We started by helping startups and small businesses navigate technology decisions. As AI began transforming the way companies operate, we expanded our focus to help clients not just survive the shift, but use it to their advantage.

Today, we work with SMBs and startups across industries, helping them build modern web platforms, modernize outdated systems, and integrate AI into their daily operations — all without requiring any technical knowledge from our clients.

companyApproach.headline: Our Approach
paragraphs: We believe good technology advice should be understandable to everyone — not just engineers. When we work with clients, we translate technical complexity into clear choices, with honest trade-offs explained in plain language.

Every engagement starts with understanding your business, not your tech stack. The right technology decision depends on where you are now, where you want to go, and what your team can realistically manage. We get to know all of that before we recommend anything.

We don't chase the newest tools for the sake of it. We recommend what's proven, practical, and right for your situation — whether that's the latest AI workflow automation or a solid, reliable platform that will keep running for years.
And when we're done, we make sure your team understands what was built and how to manage it. We build for your independence, not our ongoing dependency.
